title: Function of Department
contentHtml:
Function of Department

Civil Engineering Department of Modern Coach Factory, Raebareli is maintaining the various civil engineering assests of MCF like all residential quarters, hospital, TTC hostel, Officers club, ORH , Shopping Complex, Supervisor’s club, Roads , Eco-park, Greenery , water supply of Township & Factory , operation and maintenance of sewage tratment plants, garbage collection and its disposal, maintenance of yards and track of factory siding & factory yard, Maintenance of Administrative building, TTC building, both RUBs, maintenance of various shops like – Bogie shop, Furnishing shop, painting shop, Shell shop, Finishing shop etc. and land issues with UP Govt. , Land acquisition cases, as well as project work of Infrastructure requirment for series production of Train set Vande Bharat , Modernisation of AMV workshop and Modernisation of WRS, Kota .
contentMarkdown:
**Function of Department**

Civil Engineering Department of Modern Coach Factory, Raebareli is maintaining the various civil engineering assests of MCF like all residential quarters, hospital, TTC hostel, Officers club, ORH , Shopping Complex, Supervisor’s club, Roads , Eco-park, Greenery , water supply of Township & Factory , operation and maintenance of sewage tratment plants, garbage collection and its disposal, maintenance of yards and track of factory siding & factory yard, Maintenance of Administrative building, TTC building, both RUBs, maintenance of various shops like – Bogie shop, Furnishing shop, painting shop, Shell shop, Finishing shop etc. and land issues with UP Govt. , Land acquisition cases, as well as project work of Infrastructure requirment for series production of Train set Vande Bharat , Modernisation of AMV workshop and Modernisation of WRS, Kota .
